highlights_headline: Preview 3.119.3 collected native-dependency refreshes and AoT fixes that shipped as 3.119.4.

bullets.detail: Fixes a startup crash when consumers publish with IlcDisableReflection=true.
Adds fontconfig runtime library to the cross-compile sysroot so Linux ARM64 no longer crashes at first font use.
Enables the /Qspectre-style flag on the bundled Windows and Linux native libraries.
Updates libpng, libwebp, brotli and libexpat in the bundled Skia.

contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Spectre-mitigation build flags for the Windows and Linux native binaries.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 cut the 3.119.3 line with the AoT crash fix, the Linux ARM64 fontconfig fix, and refreshed native dependencies.
